# HENA BTP

> HENA BTP, Groupe HSE — Entreprise de Bâtiment et Travaux Publics basée à Cotonou, Bénin.

## About

HENA BTP is a construction and civil engineering company operating in Benin and West Africa. Part of Groupe HSE, the company integrates Health, Safety, and Environment (HSE) standards into every project. Founded with the mission to deliver durable, modern, and cost-effective construction solutions.

## Website

- URL: https://henabtp.com
- Language: French
- Primary audience: Individuals, businesses, and institutions in Benin and West Africa seeking construction services.

## Core Services

- **Turnkey construction**: Individual houses, modern villas, administrative and school buildings
- **Civil engineering and roadworks**: Roads, bridges, drainage, earthwork
- **Project studies and site supervision**: Feasibility studies, architectural design, real-time site monitoring
- **Building renovation and rehabilitation**: Modernization, complete rehabilitation, extensions
- **HSE monitoring**: Safety audits, worker training, weekly HSE reports

## Pricing (Indicative, per m² in FCFA)

- Simple construction: 100,000 – 140,000
- Modern standard: 150,000 – 200,000
- Luxury: 200,000 – 250,000
- High-end: 250,000 – 350,000

## Target Clients

- Individuals
- Real estate developers
- Private companies
- Public institutions
- NGOs and international organizations

## Key Values

- Excellence: Quality in every detail
- Integrity: Honesty, transparency, accountability
- Commitment: Meeting deadlines and promises
- Innovation: Modern solutions adapted to Africa
- Proximity: Listening to clients at every step

## Coverage

- Primary: Cotonou, Benin
- Extended: All cities in Benin (Abomey-Calavi, Porto-Novo, Parakou, Bohicon, Natitingou)
- Regional: West Africa
